renders/scross/cutouts/0.png.key_features: Clear view of the tablet holder, display screen, and both types of handlebars from a high angle.

renders/scross/cutouts/1.png.key_features: This image provides a comprehensive front three-quarter view of the sCross Crosstrainer, clearly showing the main body, handlebars, display, flywheel, and pedals.

renders/scross/cutouts/10.png.key_features: Clear view of the tablet holder, display screen, and the upper part of the handlebars from a high angle.

renders/scross/cutouts/11.png.key_features: Full product view from the front-three-quarter angle, showing the display, handlebars, pedals, and flywheel clearly.

renders/scross/cutouts/2.png.key_features: Shows the front 3/4 view of the crosstrainer, highlighting the pedals, flywheel, and lower frame details.

renders/scross/cutouts/3.png.key_features: Clear profile view of the entire crosstrainer, highlighting the black frame and silver flywheel, with visible display and handlebars.

renders/scross/cutouts/4.png.key_features: This image provides a comprehensive front three-quarter view of the sCross Crosstrainer, highlighting the overall design and key components like the display, handlebars, and pedals.

renders/scross/cutouts/5.png.key_features: Clear view of the entire crosstrainer from a front three-quarter angle, highlighting the display, handlebars, and pedals.

renders/scross/cutouts/6.png.key_features: Clear view of the display screen and tablet holder, showing the digital interface and tablet content.

renders/scross/cutouts/7.png.key_features: Clear view of the entire crosstrainer from a front three-quarter angle, highlighting the display, handlebars, and pedals.

renders/scross/cutouts/8.png.key_features: Clear front view of the pedals and lower handlebar area, showing the central column and base.

renders/scross/cutouts/9.png.key_features: This image provides a comprehensive front 3/4 view of the sCross Crosstrainer, showcasing all major components including the display, handlebars, flywheel, and pedals.
